full_text:
Master of the Purple Void 紫虛上人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Master of the Purple Void (紫虛上人). Predicted Liu Bei’s conquest of Yi and Pang Tong’s death. Master of the Purple Void is a fictional character.
